human_verification.notes: Reviewed commercial-and-industrial-construction commissioning coordination behavior, permit and inspection gates, site-safety escalation, startup and testing dependencies, authority boundaries, and functionality coverage for validated posture.

review_notes: All required abilities are represented and validated.
All 12 required scenarios are present and pass.
Research-summary records no blocking unresolved ambiguity; remaining ambiguity is explicitly tenant or jurisdiction retrieval work.
No retained-implementation runtime is claimed in this specification-based package.

specialist_owned_evidence: Scope is materially distinct from generic coordination through commissioning-specific artifacts such as OPR, commissioning plans, issues logs, startup forms, TAB reports, FPT evidence, systems manuals, and seasonal-testing records.
Boundary handling explicitly blocks permit approval, inspection signoff, owner acceptance, code interpretation, licensed trade signoff, design judgment, and direct field execution.

Evaluation scenarios cover normal in-scope coordination, missing prerequisites, duplicate ownership, safety changes, authority-boundary refusal, policy conflict, tenant adaptation, and closure confirmation.
Promotion to a retained implementation is explicitly deferred to a separate governance and build decision.
notes: validated packaging completed for commercial-and-industrial-construction commissioning coordination.
Validation and evidence assets are internally consistent and complete.
